caption: A group of performers dressed in traditional martial arts attire engage in a choreographed stick-fighting demonstration inside a large, ornately decorated hall. The central figure, clad in yellow, leads the action with fluid and precise movements, wielding a long staff. Surrounding him are three other performers, two in blue and one in black, each also holding sticks. They move in unison, their stances and gestures synchronized, creating a dynamic display of skill and coordination. The audience, seated around the perimeter of the room, watches attentively as the performers execute their routine with grace and intensity. The atmosphere is charged with energy, highlighting the performers' mastery of their craft.
